failedAssertions.reason: Could not verify citizen name display - no appointments exist in system. Dashboard shows 0 Citas hoy and 'No hay citas programadas para hoy'. Database verification: 0 bookings, slots are from January 2025 (past dates relative to 2026-04-20). This is a data state issue, not a UI issue.
Cannot test reassign modal - staff Carlos Pérez has 0 active bookings today, so there's nothing to reassign. The usuarios page loads and detail panel works correctly.

Duplicate procedure functionality is NOT implemented in the UI. No 'Duplicar' button or action exists for procedures. This feature requires admin-tramites-redesign (pending in tramites-reportes-auditoria-config milestone).

blockedAssertions.blockedBy: No bookings available to select in current data state. Action buttons (confirm, release, reassign) only appear when a booking is selected. Database has 0 bookings.
No series available to select in current data state. Action buttons only appear when a series is selected. Database has 0 reservation series.

blockersFound.description: No bookings exist in the system - cannot verify assertions that require appointments (VAL-DASH-002, VAL-USERS-005, VAL-REPORTES-002). Root cause: appointment_slot table has slots from January 2025 (past dates), no future slots generated.
blockersFound.location: Database state - 0 bookings, slots dated 2025-01-01 and 2025-01-22

Database verification: appointment_slot dates are 2025-01-01 and 2025-01-22 (past)
summary: Round 4 user testing for dashboard-citas-usuarios: 39/49 assertions passed. 3 failed (VAL-DASH-002, VAL-USERS-005, VAL-TRAMITES-005), 5 blocked (VAL-REPORTES-002, VAL-REPORTES-004). Status unchanged from round 3. Root causes: (1) No future slots in database so bookings cannot be created for testing; (2) VAL-TRAMITES-005 requires pending feature admin-tramites-redesign. All UI components render correctly; the failures are due to missing test data or unimplemented features, not code bugs.
